title: The Kitty Who Lives in a Banana
overview: Meet the adorable kitty who lives inside a banana!

title: Bananya and Friends, Nya
overview: Meet the adorable kitty who lives inside a banana!

title: Bananya Watches TV, Nya
overview: Bananya spends some time channel surfing with the help of Baby Bananya.

title: Bananya and the Mouse, Nya
overview: Bananya is busy doing cat things when he spots a mouse! Will his cat instincts take over?!

title: Bananya and the Refrigerator, Nya!
overview: When someone in the house leaves the refrigerator door open, Bananya and friends can't resist taking a look inside...

title: Bananya Goes Out, Nya
overview: Bananya falls asleep in Mama's purse, and she unknowingly takes him to the supermarket!

title: Bananya in the Middle of the Night, Nya
overview: Bananya and his friends explore the house late at night, when the dark, quiet atmosphere makes everything look different...

title: Bananya and the Stray Cat, Nya
overview: Bananya wakes from an afternoon nap to find a visitor peering in the window...

title: Bananya in the Bathroom, Nya
overview: Bananya and his friends discover the bathroom, where they're once again up to their usual mischief.

title: Bananya and the Balloon, Nya
overview: A balloon quietly floats in the living room, and the bananyas can't resist trying to grab it. But everyone knows cats and balloons are a dangerous combination...

title: Bananya Takes a Walk, Nya
overview: Bananya is bored, so he heads outside for a walk and a visit to a neighbor's house.

title: Bananya's Afternoon Nap, Nya
overview: Bananya is taking an afternoon nap, but some of his friends have other ideas...

title: Bananya and the Birthday, Nya
overview: The mother of the household is busily preparing for a birthday party... and the bananyas decide to help!

title: Bananya and His Friends, Nya
overview: Another day has begun. At the foot of a cat-shaped mountain sits a field of banana trees. As the bananas grow, out of them pop mysterious creatures that look a bit like cats and a bit like bananas... the bananyas! This is the rather bizarre story of a curious bunch of friends... nya!

title: Bananya and the Meowteors, Nya
overview: Meowteors rain down from the big round thing in the sky, and the bananyas collect them. They then carry all the meowteors to the elder's house. The elder grants permission, and the bananyas begin to... nya?!

title: Bananya and Droopy-eared Bananya, Nya
overview: A meowteor twinkles as it falls to the ground. It bumps into a small banana... and out of the banana pops the adorable Droopy-eared Bananya! All of the bananyas fall in love with her cuteness, nya...

title: Bananya and Ninja Training, Nya
overview: Bananya is in the mood to do ninja things after reading a ninja manga, so he and Droopy-eared Bananya become Ninja Bananya's disciples. The run through fields, dive underwater, fly through the sky... but then all the other bananyas suddenly show up. Nyan-nyan!

title: Bananya and the Mysterious Mansion, Nya
overview: Bananya and Droopy-eared Bananya are walking in the mountains when it starts to rain, so they take shelter in a mysterious mansion. Inside, they encounter the ominous figure of Scientist Bananya. They run away in shock, but something even more frightening awaits... Nyaaaa!

title: Bananya and the Robot Cat, Nya
overview: Bananya and Droopy-eared Bananya are enjoying some fishing when, to their surprise, they fish up a robot cat! They're both thrilled to have a new friend. They play hide-and seek, take catnaps, and even run through a field of flowers together! But then the robot cat stops moving... Nya, nya...

title: Bananya and Music, Nya
overview: The whole village has turned out for a music festival. Appearing on stage is... On guitar, Emo Bananya! On drums, Metal Bananya! And on vocals, Vampire Bananya! The festival reaches its climax as everyone gets into their hardcore rhythms, but then it suddenly starts to rain... Nya♪ Nya♪ Nya♪ Nya♪

title: Bananya and Chatting, Nya
overview: The cat-shaped mountain blows its top again, signaling the arrival of another meowteor. It turns out to be... a device that translates the bananyas' language??? Just what do the bananyas talk about every day, anyway? Fantastic!

title: Bananya and the Festival, Nya
overview: Today is the annual festival. Many stalls have been set up, and everyone's having a great time! Then comes the long-awaited Bon dance, and finally, an extravagant fireworks show! But the ones launching the fireworks are... the Zombie Bananyas?! Nyaaa nya-nyaaa!

title: Bananya and the Round Thing of Dreams, Nya
overview: Another meowteor falls from the sky. As he approaches it, Bananya realizes that it looks just like the round thing in the sky. He immediately takes it to the elder, who shows him many pictures of the round thing in the sky, much to Bananya's delight. But before he realizes it... nyaaa... zzz

title: Bananya and the Lost Item, Nya
overview: As Bananya and Droopy-eared Bananya are walking alongside the river, a strange wand floats their way. They ask the elder about it, and he says it belongs to the legendary Rainbow Bananya. So they set out to return the wand to its owner, but... nyanya?

title: Bananya and the Legendary Bananya, Nya
overview: Bananya and Droopy-eared Bananya meet the legendary Rainbow Bananya... along with her sister, Night Rainbow Bananya! To thank them for returning her wand, Rainbow Bananya says she'll grant any wish for them... What will Bananya wish for?! Nyaaaaaa☆彡

title: Bananya and the Big Round World, Nya
overview: Bananya looks around. What is this place??? It looks like the legendary Rainbow Bananya has used her powers to send him to the big round thing in the sky, just like he always dreamed of! And there he meets... Oh my nya!

title: An Encounter with Bananya, Nya!
overview: A lone planet hangs in the universe. This colorful planet of blue skies, white clouds, and green earth is where Bananya spends his leisurely days. One day, Baby Sweet suddenly appears before Bananya. The two quickly become friends and set out on a wondrous journey.

title: Going Tropical with an Eternal Summer Mood, Nya!
overview: Baby Sweet starts glowing, and the next thing he knows, Bananya is on an island where summer lasts forever. Bananya and Baby Sweet join Eternal Summer Bananya in fun activities like surfing, free diving, and beach volleyball. As they're lounging in the sea, they see a dorsal fin cruising their way! Bananya and friends may be in trouble!

title: Rowdy Ruffians Race Across the Wastes, Nya!
overview: Bananya and Baby Sweet reach a wasteland where dry grasses tumble across the ground. As they're looking around, they suddenly find themselves surrounded by a bunch of Rowdy Bananyas. Then our very own Western Bananya shows up, and the desert showdown begins. Who will stand victorious?!

title: Hello Halloween, Nya!
overview: Bananya and Baby Sweet come across a coffin in a dark, gloomy mansion. As Bananya carefully investigates, a strange shadow appears behind him! Startled, the duo runs away as quickly as they can, but more mysterious shadows appear one after another, refusing to let them get away! Can Bananya and Baby Sweet escape the mansion?

title: A Hero Flies Onto the Scene, Nya!
overview: A train speeds toward Bananya and Baby Sweet! It's all over! But just when all hope seems lost, the hero of justice, Bananya Man, appears! The duo find themselves entranced and decide to patrol the town, hoping to become heroes themselves. But then a menace from the skies threatens the peace...

title: Strive to Be the King of Sports, Nya!
overview: Coach Bananya has trained up champions in many sports. When the legendary coach sees hidden potential in him, Bananya starts practicing various sports. Then the day of the big tournament comes, and Bananya must face an array of champions!

title: Great Detective Bana... Nya!
overview: Victim Banana lies on the floor in the kitchen of a train bound for parts unknown. Bananya and friends are gathered together by Police Bananya, who's investigating the incident. Someone among them must be the culprit... but the investigation comes to a standstill. Just then, they're joined by a great detective who can solve any case!

title: Lost on a Snowy Mountain, Nya!
overview: Bananya is snowboarding on a snowy mountain that hosts all kinds of winter sports, but suddenly he disappears. Baby Sweet goes looking for him, clinging to her memories of all the time they've spent together. Will she manage to find Bananya?

title: Welcome to Magic School, Nya!
overview: Bananya and Baby Sweet are summoned to a magic school where young witches and wizards learn. Their eyes gleam as they see magic for the first time. Then they meet Wizard Bananya, who isn't very good with summoning magic, and try to cheer him on. He fails repeatedly at summoning, but Bananya is smiling...

title: A Wooferful Friend, Nya!
overview: Banawan: a puppy living in a banana. This is where the Banawans live, and this is where two species meet for the first time. The first contact between "nya" and "woof." Will Bananya and Banawan be able to understand each other?

title: The Great Warring States Battle, Nya!
overview: The sound of a conch shell echoes over the Warring States battlefield. Amidst the tension of the standoff between the Banana Army and the Kitty Army, Bananya makes his appearance. Without even knowing why, he's suddenly named the general of the Banana Army. Despite Bananya's bewilderment, the time has come to do battle!

title: Bananya Man's Secret, Nya!
overview: A big Pallas's cat has been watching Bananya and Baby Sweet's adventures from a distance, envious of all the fun times they have. Then, one lonely, snowy day, the Pallas's cat is visited by someone in a red suit…

title: An Invader Arrives, Nya!
overview: The true identity of the invader who's been working behind the scenes all along is revealed. Was Bananya's entire journey part of someone else's plan?! The invader's grand scheme sets in motion the greatest crisis the planet has ever faced! Bananya Man rushes to save Bananya. What does the future hold for them?!
